hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); if [[ "$DIR" == */services* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you changed a public method signature in lib/services/, update lib/services/CLAUDE.md"; elif [[ "$DIR" == */features/my_car* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you changed MyCarsBloc events/state or page structure, update lib/features/my_car/CLAUDE.md"; elif [[ "$DIR" == */features/chat* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you changed ChatCubit/ChatService interface, update lib/features/chat/CLAUDE.md"; elif [[ "$DIR" == */features/auth* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you changed AuthBloc events/flow, update lib/features/auth/CLAUDE.md"; elif [[ "$DIR" == */features* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you added/removed a feature or bloc, update lib/features/CLAUDE.md"; elif [[ "$DIR" == */core* ]]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: If you changed a core API/routing/DI interface, update lib/core/CLAUDE.md"; fi; fi'
